title: aster scaber
intro: Aster scaber, also known as thunberg aster, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aster scaber include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aster scaber can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
